Hebrews10:17 Then he adds: Their sins and lawless acts I will remember no more.
Hebrews10:18 And where these have been forgiven
Hebrews10:19 Therefore
Hebrews10:20 by a new and living way opened for us through the curtain
Hebrews10:21 and since we have a great priest over the house of God
Hebrews10:22 let us draw near to God with a sincere heart in full assurance of faith
Hebrews10:23 Let us hold unswervingly to the hope we profess
Hebrews10:24 And let us consider how we may spur one another on toward love and good deeds.
Hebrews10:25 Let us not give up meeting together
Hebrews10:26 If we deliberately keep on sinning after we have received the knowledge of the truth
Hebrews10:27 but only a fearful expectation of judgment and of raging fire that will consume the enemies of God.
Hebrews10:28 Anyone who rejected the law of Moses died without mercy on the testimony of two or three witnesses.
Hebrews10:29 How much more severely do you think a man deserves to be punished who has trampled the Son of God under foot
Hebrews10:30 For we know him who said
Hebrews10:31 It is a dreadful thing to fall into the hands of the living God.
Hebrews10:32 Remember those earlier days after you had received the light
Hebrews10:33 Sometimes you were publicly exposed to insult and persecution; at other times you stood side by side with those who were so treated.
Hebrews10:34 You sympathized with those in prison and joyfully accepted the confiscation of your property
Hebrews10:35 So do not throw away your confidence; it will be richly rewarded.
Hebrews10:36 You need to persevere so that when you have done the will of God
Hebrews10:37 For in just a very little while
Hebrews10:38 But my righteous one will live by faith. And if he shrinks back
Hebrews10:39 But we are not of those who shrink back and are destroyed
Hebrews11:1 Now faith is being sure of what we hope for and certain of what we do not see.
Hebrews11:2 This is what the ancients were commended for.
Hebrews11:3 By faith we understand that the universe was formed at God's command
Hebrews11:4 By faith Abel offered God a better sacrifice than Cain did. By faith he was commended as a righteous man
Hebrews11:5 By faith Enoch was taken from this life
Hebrews11:6 And without faith it is impossible to please God
Hebrews11:7 By faith Noah
Hebrews11:8 By faith Abraham
Hebrews11:9 By faith he made his home in the promised land like a stranger in a foreign country; he lived in tents
Hebrews11:10 For he was looking forward to the city with foundations
Hebrews11:11 By faith Abraham
Hebrews11:12 And so from this one man
Hebrews11:13 All these people were still living by faith when they died. They did not receive the things promised; they only saw them and welcomed them from a distance. And they admitted that they were aliens and strangers on earth.
Hebrews11:14 People who say such things show that they are looking for a country of their own.
Hebrews11:15 If they had been thinking of the country they had left
Hebrews11:16 Instead
Hebrews11:17 By faith Abraham
Hebrews11:18 even though God had said to him
Hebrews11:19 Abraham reasoned that God could raise the dead
Hebrews11:20 By faith Isaac blessed Jacob and Esau in regard to their future.
Hebrews11:21 By faith Jacob
Hebrews11:22 By faith Joseph
Hebrews11:23 By faith Moses' parents hid him for three months after he was born
Hebrews11:24 By faith Moses
Hebrews11:25 He chose to be mistreated along with the people of God rather than to enjoy the pleasures of sin for a short time.
Hebrews11:26 He regarded disgrace for the sake of Christ as of greater value than the treasures of Egypt
Hebrews11:27 By faith he left Egypt
Hebrews11:28 By faith he kept the Passover and the sprinkling of blood
Hebrews11:29 By faith the people passed through the Red Sea as on dry land; but when the Egyptians tried to do so
Hebrews11:30 By faith the walls of Jericho fell
Hebrews11:31 By faith the prostitute Rahab
Hebrews11:32 And what more shall I say? I do not have time to tell about Gideon
Hebrews11:33 who through faith conquered kingdoms
Hebrews11:34 quenched the fury of the flames
Hebrews11:35 Women received back their dead
Hebrews11:36 Some faced jeers and flogging
Hebrews11:37 They were stoned; they were sawed in two; they were put to death by the sword. They went about in sheepskins and goatskins
Hebrews11:38 the world was not worthy of them. They wandered in deserts and mountains
Hebrews11:39 These were all commended for their faith
Hebrews11:40 God had planned something better for us so that only together with us would they be made perfect.

2Peter3:3 First of all
2Peter3:4 They will say
2Peter3:5 But they deliberately forget that long ago by God's word the heavens existed and the earth was formed out of water and by water.
2Peter3:6 By these waters also the world of that time was deluged and destroyed.
2Peter3:7 By the same word the present heavens and earth are reserved for fire
2Peter3:8 But do not forget this one thing
2Peter3:9 The Lord is not slow in keeping his promise
2Peter3:10 But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a roar; the elements will be destroyed by fire
2Peter3:11 Since everything will be destroyed in this way
2Peter3:12 as you look forward to the day of God and speed its coming. That day will bring about the destruction of the heavens by fire
2Peter3:13 But in keeping with his promise we are looking forward to a new heaven and a new earth

1John3:6 No one who lives in him keeps on sinning. No one who continues to sin has either seen him or known him.
1John3:7 Dear children
1John3:8 He who does what is sinful is of the devil
1John3:9 No one who is born of God will continue to sin
1John3:10 This is how we know who the children of God are and who the children of the devil are: Anyone who does not do what is right is not a child of God; nor is anyone who does not love his brother.
1John3:11 This is the message you heard from the beginning: We should love one another.
1John3:12 Do not be like Cain
1John3:13 Do not be surprised
1John3:14 We know that we have passed from death to life
1John3:15 Anyone who hates his brother is a murderer
1John3:16 This is how we know what love is: Jesus Christ laid down his life for us. And we ought to lay down our lives for our brothers.
1John3:17 If anyone has material possessions and sees his brother in need but has no pity on him
1John3:18 Dear children
1John3:19 This then is how we know that we belong to the truth
1John3:20 whenever our hearts condemn us. For God is greater than our hearts
1John3:21 Dear friends
1John3:22 and receive from him anything we ask
1John3:23 And this is his command: to believe in the name of his Son
1John3:24 Those who obey his commands live in him
1John4:1 Dear friends
1John4:2 This is how you can recognize the Spirit of God: Every spirit that acknowledges that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is from God
1John4:3 but every spirit that does not acknowledge Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist
1John4:4 You
1John4:5 They are from the world and therefore speak from the viewpoint of the world
1John4:6 We are from God
1John4:7 Dear friends
1John4:8 Whoever does not love does not know God
1John4:9 This is how God showed his love among us: He sent his one and only Son into the world that we might live through him.
1John4:10 This is love: not that we loved God
1John4:11 Dear friends
1John4:12 No one has ever seen God; but if we love one another
1John4:13 We know that we live in him and he in us
1John4:14 And we have seen and testify that the Father has sent his Son to be the Savior of the world.
1John4:15 If anyone acknowledges that Jesus is the Son of God
1John4:16 And so we know and rely on the love God has for us. God is love. Whoever lives in love lives in God
1John4:17 In this way
1John4:18 There is no fear in love. But perfect love drives out fear
1John4:19 We love because he first loved us.
1John4:20 If anyone says
1John4:21 And he has given us this command: Whoever loves God must also love his brother.
1John5:1 Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ is born of God
1John5:2 This is how we know that we love the children of God: by loving God and carrying out his commands.
1John5:3 This is love for God: to obey his commands. And his commands are not burdensome
1John5:4 for everyone born of God overcomes the world. This is the victory that has overcome the world
1John5:5 Who is it that overcomes the world? Only he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God.
1John5:6 This is the one who came by water and blood--Jesus Christ. He did not come by water only
1John5:7 For there are three that testify:
1John5:8 the Spirit
1John5:9 We accept man's testimony
1John5:10 Anyone who believes in the Son of God has this testimony in his heart. Anyone who does not believe God has made him out to be a liar
1John5:11 And this is the testimony: God has given us eternal life
1John5:12 He who has the Son has life; he who does not have the Son of God does not have life.
1John5:13 I write these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God so that you may know that you have eternal life.
1John5:14 This is the confidence we have in approaching God: that if we ask anything according to his will
1John5:15 And if we know that he hears us--whatever we ask--we know that we have what we asked of him.
1John5:16 If anyone sees his brother commit a sin that does not lead to death
1John5:17 All wrongdoing is sin
1John5:18 We know that anyone born of God does not continue to sin; the one who was born of God keeps him safe
1John5:19 We know that we are children of God
1John5:20 We know also that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding
1John5:21 Dear children

2John1:2 To the chosen lady and her children
2John1:3 Grace
2John1:4 It has given me great joy to find some of your children walking in the truth
2John1:5 And now
2John1:6 And this is love: that we walk in obedience to his commands. As you have heard from the beginning

2John1:11 Anyone who welcomes him shares in his wicked work.

2John1:13 The children of your chosen sister send their greetings.

3John1:2 Dear friend

3John1:4 I have no greater joy than to hear that my children are walking in the truth.

3John1:6 They have told the church about your love. You will do well to send them on their way in a manner worthy of God.
3John1:7 It was for the sake of the Name that they went out
3John1:8 We ought therefore to show hospitality to such men so that we may work together for the truth.

3John1:10 So if I come

Jude1:13 They are wild waves of the sea
Jude1:14 Enoch
Jude1:15 to judge everyone

Jude1:18 They said to you
Jude1:19 These are the men who divide you
Jude1:20 But you

Jude1:23 snatch others from the fire and save them; to others show mercy
Jude1:24 To him who is able to keep you from falling and to present you before his glorious presence without fault and with great joy--

Revelation17:3 Then the angel carried me away in the Spirit into a desert. There I saw a woman sitting on a scarlet beast that was covered with blasphemous names and had seven heads and ten horns.
Revelation17:4 The woman was dressed in purple and scarlet
Revelation17:5 This title was written on her forehead: MYSTERY BABYLON THE GREAT THE MOTHER OF PROSTITUTES AND OF THE ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH.
Revelation17:6 I saw that the woman was drunk with the blood of the saints
Revelation17:7 When I saw her
Revelation17:8 The beast
Revelation17:9 This calls for a mind with wisdom. The seven heads are seven hills on which the woman sits.
Revelation17:10 They are also seven kings. Five have fallen
Revelation17:11 The beast who once was
Revelation17:12 The ten horns you saw are ten kings who have not yet received a kingdom
Revelation17:13 They have one purpose and will give their power and authority to the beast.
Revelation17:14 They will make war against the Lamb
Revelation17:15 Then the angel said to me
Revelation17:16 The beast and the ten horns you saw will hate the prostitute. They will bring her to ruin and leave her naked; they will eat her flesh and burn her with fire.
Revelation17:17 For God has put it into their hearts to accomplish his purpose by agreeing to give the beast their power to rule
Revelation17:18 The woman you saw is the great city that rules over the kings of the earth.
Revelation18:1 After this I saw another angel coming down from heaven. He had great authority
Revelation18:2 With a mighty voice he shouted: Fallen! Fallen is Babylon the Great! She has become a home for demons and a haunt for every evil spirit
Revelation18:3 For all the nations have drunk the maddening wine of her adulteries. The kings of the earth committed adultery with her
Revelation18:4 Then I heard another voice from heaven say: Come out of her
Revelation18:5 for her sins are piled up to heaven
Revelation18:6 Give back to her as she has given; pay her back double for what she has done. Mix her a double portion from her own cup.
Revelation18:7 Give her as much torture and grief as the glory and luxury she gave herself. In her heart she boasts
Revelation18:8 Therefore in one day her plagues will overtake her: death
Revelation18:9 When the kings of the earth who committed adultery with her and shared her luxury see the smoke of her burning
Revelation18:10 Terrified at her torment
Revelation18:11 The merchants of the earth will weep and mourn over her because no one buys their cargoes any more--
Revelation18:12 cargoes of gold
Revelation18:13 cargoes of cinnamon and spice
Revelation18:14 They will say
Revelation18:15 The merchants who sold these things and gained their wealth from her will stand far off
Revelation18:16 and cry out: 'Woe! Woe
Revelation18:17 In one hour such great wealth has been brought to ruin!'
Revelation18:18 Every sea captain
Revelation18:19 They will throw dust on their heads
Revelation18:20 Rejoice over her
Revelation18:21 Then a mighty angel picked up a boulder the size of a large millstone and threw it into the sea
Revelation18:22 The music of harpists and musicians
Revelation18:23 The light of a lamp will never shine in you again. The voice of bridegroom and bride will never be heard in you again. Your merchants were the world's great men. By your magic spell all the nations were led astray.
Revelation18:24 In her was found the blood of prophets and of the saints
Revelation19:1 After this I heard what sounded like the roar of a great multitude in heaven shouting: Hallelujah! Salvation and glory and power belong to our God
Revelation19:2 for true and just are his judgments. He has condemned the great prostitute who corrupted the earth by her adulteries. He has avenged on her the blood of his servants.
Revelation19:3 And again they shouted: Hallelujah! The smoke from her goes up for ever and ever.
Revelation19:4 The twenty-four elders and the four living creatures fell down and worshiped God
Revelation19:5 Then a voice came from the throne
Revelation19:6 Then I heard what sounded like a great multitude
Revelation19:7 Let us rejoice and be glad and give him glory! For the wedding of the Lamb has come
Revelation19:8 Fine linen
Revelation19:9 Then the angel said to me
Revelation19:10 At this I fell at his feet to worship him. But he said to me
Revelation19:11 I saw heaven standing open and there before me was a white horse
Revelation19:12 His eyes are like blazing fire
Revelation19:13 He is dressed in a robe dipped in blood
Revelation19:14 The armies of heaven were following him
Revelation19:15 Out of his mouth comes a sharp sword with which to strike down the nations. He will rule them with an iron scepter. He treads the winepress of the fury of the wrath of God Almighty.
Revelation19:16 On his robe and on his thigh he has this name written: KING OF KINGS AND LORD OF LORDS.
Revelation19:17 And I saw an angel standing in the sun
Revelation19:18 so that you may eat the flesh of kings
Revelation19:19 Then I saw the beast and the kings of the earth and their armies gathered together to make war against the rider on the horse and his army.
Revelation19:20 But the beast was captured
Revelation19:21 The rest of them were killed with the sword that came out of the mouth of the rider on the horse
Revelation20:1 And I saw an angel coming down out of heaven
Revelation20:2 He seized the dragon
Revelation20:3 He threw him into the Abyss
Revelation20:4 I saw thrones on which were seated those who had been given authority to judge. And I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded because of their testimony for Jesus and because of the word of God. They had not worshiped the beast or his image and had not received his mark on their foreheads or their hands. They came to life and reigned with Christ a thousand years.
Revelation20:5 (The rest of the dead did not come to life until the thousand years were ended.) This is the first resurrection.
Revelation20:6 Blessed and holy are those who have part in the first resurrection. The second death has no power over them
Revelation20:7 When the thousand years are over
Revelation20:8 and will go out to deceive the nations in the four corners of the earth--Gog and Magog--to gather them for battle. In number they are like the sand on the seashore.
Revelation20:9 They marched across the breadth of the earth and surrounded the camp of God's people
Revelation20:10 And the devil
Revelation20:11 Then I saw a great white throne and him who was seated on it. Earth and sky fled from his presence
Revelation20:12 And I saw the dead
Revelation20:13 The sea gave up the dead that were in it
Revelation20:14 Then death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire. The lake of fire is the second death.
Revelation20:15 If anyone's name was not found written in the book of life
Revelation21:1 Then I saw a new heaven and a new earth
Revelation21:2 I saw the Holy City
Revelation21:3 And I heard a loud voice from the throne saying
Revelation21:4 He will wipe every tear from their eyes. There will be no more death or mourning or crying or pain
Revelation21:5 He who was seated on the throne said
Revelation21:6 He said to me: It is done. I am the Alpha and the Omega
Revelation21:7 He who overcomes will inherit all this
Revelation21:8 But the cowardly
Revelation21:9 One of the seven angels who had the seven bowls full of the seven last plagues came and said to me
Revelation21:10 And he carried me away in the Spirit to a mountain great and high
Revelation21:11 It shone with the glory of God
Revelation21:12 It had a great
Revelation21:13 There were three gates on the east
Revelation21:14 The wall of the city had twelve foundations
Revelation21:15 The angel who talked with me had a measuring rod of gold to measure the city
Revelation21:16 The city was laid out like a square
Revelation21:17 He measured its wall and it was 144 cubits thick
Revelation21:18 The wall was made of jasper
Revelation21:19 The foundations of the city walls were decorated with every kind of precious stone. The first foundation was jasper
Revelation21:20 the fifth sardonyx
Revelation21:21 The twelve gates were twelve pearls
Revelation21:22 I did not see a temple in the city
Revelation21:23 The city does not need the sun or the moon to shine on it
Revelation21:24 The nations will walk by its light
Revelation21:25 On no day will its gates ever be shut
Revelation21:26 The glory and honor of the nations will be brought into it.
Revelation21:27 Nothing impure will ever enter it
Revelation22:1 Then the angel showed me the river of the water of life
Revelation22:2 down the middle of the great street of the city. On each side of the river stood the tree of life
Revelation22:3 No longer will there be any curse. The throne of God and of the Lamb will be in the city
Revelation22:4 They will see his face
Revelation22:5 There will be no more night. They will not need the light of a lamp or the light of the sun
Revelation22:6 The angel said to me
Revelation22:7 Behold
Revelation22:8 I
Revelation22:9 But he said to me
Revelation22:10 Then he told me
Revelation22:11 Let him who does wrong continue to do wrong; let him who is vile continue to be vile; let him who does right continue to do right; and let him who is holy continue to be holy.
Revelation22:12 Behold
Revelation22:13 I am the Alpha and the Omega
Revelation22:14 Blessed are those who wash their robes
Revelation22:15 Outside are the dogs
Revelation22:16 I
Revelation22:17 The Spirit and the bride say
Revelation22:18 I warn everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book: If anyone adds anything to them
Revelation22:19 And if anyone takes words away from this book of prophecy
Revelation22:20 He who testifies to these things says
